title: Proxmox-family OpenTofu Provider
description: Generic-over-the-API provider for PVE/PBS/PMG/PDM (proxmox_object + proxmox_task). 100% coverage by construction.

phases.title: Transport (all 4 products)
phases.exit_criteria: internal/proxmox builds; product spec, ticket+CSRF and API-token auth, and UPID TaskWait unit-tested.

items.description: ticket+CSRF + API-token auth, Get/Post/Put/Delete, APIError/NotFound, writeMu

phases.title: Resources (PVE-validated)
phases.exit_criteria: proxmox_object imports an existing CT /config to 0-diff; proxmox_task creates+starts+destroys a CT.

items.description: imperative async resource (UPID poll) + data source

phases.title: PBS/PMG/PDM validation
phases.exit_criteria: read-only object/task smoke against each product confirms auth+port routing.

phases.title: Monorepo migration (separate effort)
phases.exit_criteria: tofu/opentofu/hv/pve migrated off bpg/proxmox to this provider.

items.description: Replace bpg resources with proxmox_object/proxmox_task; preserve NetBox SoT + ansible handoff
